name: Taco Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble pork sausage into a 1-quart casserole.
2. Stir in onion.
3. Cook uncovered on high power for 4 minutes or until the meat is no longer pink, stirring once.
4. Drain off excess fat.
5. Stir in tomato sauce, canned green chili peppers, flour, chili powder, and garlic powder.
6. Cook covered on high power for 2 to 3 minutes or until slightly thickened and bubbly.
7. In a salad bowl, toss together lettuce, carrot, and tomatoes.
8. Top with sausage mixture, shredded cheese, and taco chips.
